title: crepidomanes latealatum
intro: Crepidomanes latealatum, also known as the laterally forked crepidomanes, is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Crepidomanes latealatum include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and alleviate skin conditions such as eczema. In herbal preparations, Crepidomanes latealatum is often used in infusions, decoctions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
